headline: Popular Mexican chain joins wave of Chapter 11 bankruptcies
summary: While inflation, rising labor costs, and a struggling economy have hit many restaurants hard, Mexican chains have seemingly faced even deeper problems. “It’s really tough because prices have just been rising, and a lot of consumers don’t feel as though their salaries have kept pace,” Justine Rapp ...

headline: Gas price spikes don’t impact restaurant traffic: BTIG
summary: By analyzing 20 years of data, the firm found little correlation between gas prices hikes and restaurant traffic drops.
